title: Quick guide before editing
intro: Review these three steps before editing the source file on GitHub. It keeps contributions easier to review, discuss, and merge.
invalidTarget: No valid edit target was found. Open this page from the Edit source button on a Wiki article.

steps.title: Confirm the file scope
steps.body: Only change content related to the current article. Artist pages live under src/content/artists and are split by category, name, and locale.

steps.title: Keep the content structure
steps.body: Keep the frontmatter fields and avoid moving files unless the structure is being reviewed. Write the body in Markdown and cite sources when possible.

steps.title: Submit through a Pull Request
steps.body: After editing on GitHub, commit to a branch, open a PR, and wait for CI to pass before merging.

ready: I finished the guide, edit on GitHub
locked: Complete the three steps above to unlock GitHub editing
